_comment: Dashboard layouts. EDIT THIS FILE to add/rearrange dashboards and widgets — no code changes needed. `group` buckets a dashboard in the sidebar (e.g. Personal / Work). Widget types: section | stat | goal | group | trend | progress | text | note. Reference a metric by its catalog key (metrics.json). 'field' selects the number for stat/goal/trend/progress: current (headline: latest for last-metrics, today for sum/count) | week (this-week aggregate). 'span' (1-4) = column width. Order in the array = order on screen.

dashboards.title: Personal — Today
dashboards.subtitle: How today is going, at a glance.

items.label: Morning journal
items.confirm: Mark Morning journal as done? Use this if you journaled on paper — otherwise it completes when you create the Notion journal.

dashboards.title: Personal — This Week
dashboards.subtitle: This week's scorecard (starts Sunday) — where I'm on track and where to push. Same data as Today, pivoted to the week.

widgets.title: Dev & ops time vs weekly goal

widgets.text: Qualitative focus only — the numeric targets live in the widgets above. These are the behavioral changes / experiments I'm making this week.

dashboards.title: Personal — Trends
dashboards.subtitle: Weekly trends over the last ~12 weeks. Click a week on any chart to see what you did.

dashboards.title: Plan — This Week
dashboards.subtitle: Weekly plan snapshot: life-area health, intentions, and projects queued for this week. Browse past weeks with the picker (same as Personal boards). Click a project for its task board.

dashboards.title: Plan — This Month
dashboards.subtitle: Monthly plan snapshot: domain health ratings, forward commitments, and projects on the month timeline. Browse past months with the picker.

dashboards.title: Plan — Quarter
dashboards.subtitle: Quarterly roadmap view — goals and projects spanning the quarter. Full quarterly-plan printout integration coming next.

widgets.text: Quarter board is a lightweight template for now. Use the week and month boards for execution; run the quarterly plan workflow for the full narrative + PDF.

dashboards.title: Plan — Year
dashboards.subtitle: Annual goals and year-scale project timeline. Full year-plan integration coming next.

widgets.text: Year board is a lightweight template for now. Annual plan workflow populates Goals + rough project buckets — drill down via week/month for execution.

dashboards.title: Health — Deep Dive
dashboards.subtitle: Deeper dive into health trends. Set the window with the Range dropdown (top-right): past 7 / 30 / 60 / 90 days, 6 months, or a year. Every widget re-summarizes over that window. Click a chart point or summary tile for the underlying records.

widgets.title: Daily average intake over the window

widgets.text: Extent (zones involved / extent score) is the stable clinical outcome — lower is better. Redness is noisy severity (varies with debridement). Source: weekly tracking-shot measurements. See context/self/skin-tracking.md.

Dentist visits + teeth whitening are logged in Notion (Dental Visits Log / Teeth Whitening Log). The dentist card turns amber within 30 days of the 6-month due date and red when overdue — book the next cleaning when it does.

dashboards.title: Chrome Lot — Today
dashboards.subtitle: Today's schedule and team status. Pick a day to look back.

widgets.text: Jobs = dealership appointments; cars = vehicles actually shot. Click a tile for the underlying records.

dashboards.title: Chrome Lot — This Week
dashboards.subtitle: Throughput and team status for the week (Sun–Sat).

widgets.text: Avg jobs/day and avg cars/day gauge how busy the schedule ran this week (weekdays only shooting).

dashboards.title: Chrome Lot — Trends
dashboards.subtitle: Weekly trends over ~12 weeks. Click a week on any chart to see the underlying records.

dashboards.title: Chrome Lot — Banking
dashboards.subtitle: Business cash & spend from connected bank accounts. QuickBooks stays the system of record for P&L.

widgets.title: Spend vs income over the window
Business accounts
widgets.emptyText: No business accounts classified yet. Tag Chase business accounts in dashboard/config/finance-accounts.json.

widgets.title: Business transactions (window)
widgets.emptyText: No business transactions in this window.

widgets.text: Chase business accounts feed this board via SimpleFIN, classified in dashboard/config/finance-accounts.json. QuickBooks remains the system of record for P&L, categorization, and quarterly estimates (separate pipe — see context/work/finances/index.md).

dashboards.title: Finance — Overview
dashboards.subtitle: Personal net worth, balances, and trend. Business banking lives under Chrome Lot › Banking.

widgets.title: Personal accounts
widgets.emptyText: No personal accounts yet — connect institutions in SimpleFIN, then rebuild.

widgets.text: Net-worth / cash trend is reconstructed from current balances + transaction history (exact for cash & credit; investment market drift between trades is approximate). Accounts are split personal vs business in dashboard/config/finance-accounts.json.

dashboards.title: Finance — Spending
dashboards.subtitle: Personal cash flow, categories, and recurring charges over the selected window.

widgets.title: Recurring merchants
widgets.emptyText: No recurring charges detected yet (needs 2+ months of history).

dashboards.title: Finance — Investments
dashboards.subtitle: Personal brokerage / retirement holdings, where SimpleFIN returns them.

widgets.title: Holdings
widgets.emptyText: No holdings returned yet. SimpleFIN exposes brokerage holdings for some institutions only.

widgets.text: Investment data is second-class in SimpleFIN — balances are reliable; per-lot holdings and cost basis vary by brokerage. For full portfolio analytics, add a broker CSV import later.
